mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C-PM — Python and USB Failure Postmortem

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_PM"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
 (drop/r"v1a3c_failure_postmortem_v1.py",installed/r"v1a3c_failure_postmortem_v1.py","474931ca30ea79e0176373b486bbca48a13fdf00429eaad50a198846fdce7ee5"),
 (drop/r"POSTMORTEM_CONTRACT_V1.json",installed/r"POSTMORTEM_CONTRACT_V1.json","88f1865f67dad689d72cf9316cff270f3f094ab633fa1b4842d5842c9003f834"),
 (drop/r"README_V1A3C_PM.md",installed/r"README_V1A3C_PM.md","2c8a473f4adce0537bd8f255e4d6cfbd16f29a884ccc343c9659adbf8d8e9bad"),
]
for src,dst,expected in checks:
 assert src.is_file() and dst.is_file(),(src,dst)
 assert hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,src
 assert hashlib.sha256(dst.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,dst
script=(installed/r"v1a3c_failure_postmortem_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/r"v1a3c_failure_postmortem_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
run_calls=0
for node in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(node,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in node.names)
 elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module: imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
 if isinstance(node,ast.Call) and isinstance(node.func,ast.Attribute) and isinstance(node.func.value,ast.Name):
  if node.func.value.id=='subprocess' and node.func.attr=='run': run_calls+=1
forbidden={"socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
assert run_calls==1,run_calls
assert 'shell=False' in script
assert 'powershell.exe' in script
assert 'MAX_DISCOVERED_FILES = 120' in script
assert 'OUTPUT_CEILING_BYTES = 8 * 1024 * 1024' in script
ps=script.split('script = rf"""',1)[1].split('""".strip()',1)[0].casefold()
for marker in ('repair-volume','format-volume','clear-disk','initialize-disk','set-disk','set-partition','remove-item','rename-item','start-process','chkdsk','defrag','optimize-volume'):
 assert marker not in ps,marker
contract=json.loads((installed/r"POSTMORTEM_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get('mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-164308-A1692D'
assert contract.get('failed_mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6'
assert contract.get('scope',{}).get('allowed_child_processes')==1
assert contract.get('scope',{}).get('maximum_output_bytes')==8388608
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_PM_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK')
validations.name: Verify exact postmortem payloads, syntax, single bounded PowerShell query, and no repair commands
Run bounded in-memory postmortem classification and redaction self-tests
Collect bounded Workshop, volume, snapshot, and Windows event evidence without repair
Run built-in postmortem output, hash, safety, and 8 MiB ceiling validator

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-164308-A1692D_V1A3C_PM_POSTMORTEM")
required={"POSTMORTEM_EVIDENCE.json","FAILURE_CLASSIFICATION.json","POSTMORTEM_SUMMARY.md","POSTMORTEM_RECEIPT.json"}
assert required.issubset({p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()})
evidence=json.loads((out/r"POSTMORTEM_EVIDENCE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
classification=json.loads((out/r"FAILURE_CLASSIFICATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt=json.loads((out/r"POSTMORTEM_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert evidence.get('mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-161617-AA7BE6'
assert evidence.get('postmortem_mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-164308-A1692D'
assert evidence.get('current_volume_state',{}).get('foxai_path_accessible') is True
assert receipt.get('mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-164308-A1692D'
assert receipt.get('result')=='bounded_postmortem_complete'
assert receipt.get('powershell_child_process_count')==1
for key in ('network_used','packages_installed','repair_commands_run','chkdsk_run','benchmark_or_stress_test_run','foxai_application_launched','models_loaded','full_source_tree_scanned','existing_foxai_files_modified','live_system_modified_outside_authorized_outputs'):
 assert receipt.get(key) is False,(key,receipt.get(key))
assert classification.get('network_used') is False
assert classification.get('repair_commands_run') is False
assert classification.get('existing_foxai_files_modified') is False
for item in receipt.get('core_outputs_before_receipt',[]):
 p=out/item['name']
 assert p.is_file() and p.stat().st_size==item['size_bytes']
 assert hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item['sha256']
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total<=8*1024*1024,total
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A3C_PM_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED')
validations.name: Verify authoritative rollback evidence, current drive access, one read-only query, output hashes, and zero repair actions
